title: Bridge Essay: An insula hierarchical network architecture for active interoceptive inference.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body-energy — interoception, heart-brain axis, breathing entrainment, spiritus.

**An insula hierarchical network architecture for active interoceptive inference.**. R Soc Open Sci.. PMID: 35774133. DOI: 10.1098/rsos.220226. In the brain, the insular cortex receives avast amount of interoceptive information, ascending through deep brain structures, from multiple visceral organs. The unique hierarchical and modular architecture of the insula suggests specialization for processing interoceptive afferents. Yet, the biological significance of the insula'sneuroanatomical architecture, in relation to deep brain structures, remains obscure.
